prediction.reasoning: The prediction is based on a Geometric Brownian Motion model. Historical daily returns for GS were analyzed over the past year to estimate an average daily drift (mean log return) of approximately 0.04% and daily volatility (standard deviation of log returns) of approximately 1.5%. These parameters were then used to project the median price for 20 trading days and construct confidence intervals based on a log-normal distribution, assuming market conditions and volatility remain consistent. The current price of $911.85 was used as the starting point.
